title: Bad Mod
description: This Mod Gives You More Things To Play Around With Like The Metal Detector And Other Stuff
body:
# This Mod Inclues

- **Ruby Ore**
- **Ruby Block**
- **Raw Ruby**
- **Ruby(Secret Recipe)**
- **Andrew Tate**
- **Ruby Pickaxe**
- **Ruby Axe**
- **Ruby Shovel**
- **Ruby Hoe**
- **Ruby Sword**
- **Custom Fuels** 
- **New Bosses (Not Added Yet 51% Completed)**
- **Ruby Door**
- **Ruby Trapdoor**
- **Ruby Button**
- **Ruby Pressure Plate**
- **Ruby Stairs**
- **Ruby Slab**
- **Ruby Fence**
- **Ruby Fen Gate**
- **Ruby Wall**
- **Ruby Refiner(21% Completed)**
- **Ruby Mace(1% Completed)**
- **Metal Detector**
- **~~-Maby More I Forgor~~**


-----------------------------------------
# What This Mod Needs

- **Fabric API**
-----------------------------------------
# Why You Should Download This Mod
- **~~Well I Did Say This Was The Worst Mod Ever~~**
- Because You Get Cool New Things And Bosses(51% Completed)
- More Minecrafty Things
- Cool New  
# Commands
-----------------------------------------
- **_Arithmatic Operations Use_**
- **_/arithmetic addition (amount) (amount)_**
- **_/arithmetic multiplication (amount) (amount)_**
- **_/arithmetic substraction (amount) (amount)_**
- **_/arithmetic division (amount) (amount)_**
- **_Added gmc command which lets you change ur gamemode to creative (requires op)_**
-  **_Added gma command which lets you change ur gamemode to adventure (requires op)_**
-  **_Added gms command which lets you change ur gamemode to survival (requires op)_**
-  **_Added gmsp command which lets you change ur gamemode to spectator (requires op)_**

- **_Added Custom Give Command_**
  
- **_/cgive ruby_block (amount)_**
- **_/cgive raw_ruby_block (amount)_**
- **_/cgive sound_block (amount)_**
- **_/cgive ruby_stairs (amount)_**
- **_/cgive ruby_button (amount)_**
